department: Department of Computer Science & Information Technology (CSIT)

Integrated UG/PG (B.Sc. + M.Sc.).eligibility: 10+2 with Mathematics / Science stream. Admission via CUET UG.
Integrated UG/PG (B.Sc. + M.Sc.).exit_option: Students may exit after 3 years with a UG degree.

M.Sc. (Computer Science).eligibility: B.Sc. / BCA / B.Tech in CS or related field. Admission via CUET PG.

MCA (Master of Computer Applications).eligibility: Graduation in any stream with Mathematics at 10+2 or graduation level. Admission via CUET PG.

Ph.D. (Computer Science / IT).eligibility: M.Sc. CS/IT / MCA / M.Tech with minimum 55% marks. Admission via VRET (university entrance test). UGC-NET / GATE / JRF holders may be exempted from VRET.
Ph.D. (Computer Science / IT).fellowship: JRF/SRF fellowships available for eligible NET/GATE qualified students.

hostel.note: Hostel allocation is subject to seat availability. Apply separately via SAMARTH Portal.

scholarships_that_cover_fees: NSP (National Scholarship Portal) — covers full/partial tuition for SC/ST/OBC/EWS
Post-Matric Scholarship — State Government of Chhattisgarh
Central Sector Scholarship — for meritorious students
Sudama Scholarship — for economically weaker students in Chhattisgarh
University Merit-based Fee Waiver — for top-performing students (up to 100% tuition waiver)
fees.note: GGV is a Central University. Fees are heavily subsidised compared to private institutions. Exact fees may be revised each session — always verify at www.ggu.ac.in.

faculty.name: Dr. Babita Majhi
faculty.specialization: Signal Processing, Soft Computing, Neural Networks, Evolutionary Algorithms
faculty.notable: Widely published in international journals. Active research collaborations with national institutions.
faculty.google_scholar: Available on Google Scholar (search: Babita Majhi GGV)

faculty.name: Dr. Santosh Kumar Majhi
faculty.specialization: Soft Computing, Machine Learning, Pattern Recognition, Nature-Inspired Algorithms
faculty.notable: Google Scholar citations: 1,339+. ORCID: 0000-0002-8887-6933. Joined GGV in November 2023.

faculty.name: Dr. Pushplata Pujari
faculty.specialization: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Image Processing, Plant Recognition using CNN
faculty.notable: Published research on CNN-based plant recognition (VGG16, ResNet101). Work on oil spill classification using Random Forest and XGBoost.

faculty.name: Dr. Amitesh Kumar Jha
faculty.specialization: Database Systems, Data Mining, Information Retrieval
faculty.notable: Active in departmental academic activities and curriculum development.

faculty.name: Dr. Sushma Jaiswal
faculty.specialization: Natural Language Processing, Data Mining, Text Analytics
faculty.notable: Research focused on NLP applications and text classification.

faculty.name: Dr. Akhilesh Kumar Shrivas
faculty.specialization: Machine Learning, Feature Selection, Data Science, High-Dimensional Data
faculty.notable: Scopus Author ID: 57211027423. Google Scholar citations: 723+. Joined December 2019.

faculty.name: Dr. Vikas Kumar Pandey
faculty.specialization: Computer Vision, Deep Learning, Feature Extraction
faculty.notable: Published a patent (No. 202421079026A) on feature selection in high-dimensional datasets (2024). Filed Oct 2024, Published Nov 2024.

faculty.name: Dr. Vineet Kumar Awasthi
faculty.specialization: Cloud Computing, Network Security, Distributed Systems
faculty.notable: Research in cloud architecture and security frameworks.

faculty.name: Mr. Prashant Vaishnav
faculty.specialization: Deep Learning, Plant Disease Detection, Convolutional Neural Networks
faculty.notable: Patent filed (2024): 'A Feature Selection System with Incremental Feature Clustering in High Dimensional Dataset' — Patent No. 202421079026A. Published in IJCA Vol. 187, 2025.

faculty.name: Mr. Vivek Kumar Sarthe
faculty.notable: Scopus Author ID: 57211027423. Google Scholar citations: 3,464+. ORCID: 0000-0001-7620-8674.

faculty.name: Mr. Abhishek Patel
faculty.specialization: Software Engineering, Web Technologies, Full Stack Development
faculty.notable: Actively involved in industry-linked project mentoring for students.

facilities: Departmental computer lab with branded PCs (latest configuration) — students get dedicated hands-on time
Departmental library — CS/IT books, journals, and reference material
Central (Nalanda) Library — 1.44+ lakh volumes, 418 printed journals, 8,156+ online journals, 24-hr access during exams
High-speed internet and Wi-Fi across the entire campus
Separate Boys hostels (3) and Girls hostels (3) on campus
800-seat University Auditorium for seminars, convocations and cultural events
Sports complex — cricket ground, football field, basketball, volleyball, badminton, swimming pool, gymnasium, skating rink
University Health Centre — Medical Officer + visiting CIMS specialists
University bus service between Bilaspur city and Koni campus

placement.placement_cell: GGV has a dedicated Placement Cell that handles campus drives, career counselling, and industry tie-ups.
placement.note: CSIT graduates are placed in software development, data science, IT consulting, and research roles.

scholarship: NSP (National Scholarship Portal) — covers full/partial tuition for SC/ST/OBC/EWS students
Central Sector Scholarship — for meritorious students (top 20% in board exams)
Merit-based fee waiver by the university for top-performing students
JRF/SRF Fellowships for Ph.D. scholars with UGC-NET/GATE qualification
University-level need-based financial aid — apply through SAMARTH Portal

research.summary: The CSIT department has hosted national and international conferences, including SCICT-2011 with speakers from Taiwan, Korea, Hong Kong, and leading Indian IITs. Faculty maintain active collaborations with national and international institutions.
recent_highlights: Patent filed 2024: Feature Selection System for High-Dimensional Datasets (Prashant Vaishnav)
Deep Learning-based plant recognition using VGG16 and ResNet101 (Dr. Pushplata Pujari)
Oil spill classification using Random Forest and XGBoost
DST Government of India funded project on IoT-based Healthcare

exam_pattern: GGV follows a semester system. Each semester has: 2 internal class tests + 1 mid-semester exam + 1 end-semester exam. Students can view their checked answer sheets as per Academic Council guidelines. Grading is on a 10-point CGPA scale.

admission_process.UG / Integrated UG-PG: Apply via CUET UG → Register on SAMARTH Portal at www.ggu.ac.in → Merit-based selection.
admission_process.M.Sc. CS / IT: Apply via CUET PG → Register on SAMARTH Portal → Selection based on CUET PG score.
admission_process.MCA: Apply via CUET PG → Register on SAMARTH Portal → Selection based on CUET PG score.
Apply for VRET (Vishwavidyalaya Research Entrance Test) → Interview. UGC-NET/GATE/JRF holders may be exempted from VRET.
